ideation: This animation sequence depicts the act of gripping the tram's handrail, reflecting the act of riding public transit.  The animation will focus on the hands moving to a gripping position, emphasizing the action of holding onto something for support. The left arm will primarily be used for this action, while the right arm will remain more relaxed to provide contrast and balance.  The frames will show a progression of the left arm reaching, gripping, and then holding the rail. The overall emotion is one of stability and security while in motion.

frames.beat: left arm reaches out to grab the tram rail
fingers curl around the pole, securing a grip
holding steady on the moving tram
